name: Paver Calculator
seo_description: Calculate how many pavers you need plus base gravel and sand quantities. Enter area dimensions and paver size to get exact material quantities with waste.
description: Free online paver calculator. Enter area length and area width to get instant results.
desc: Free online paver calculator. Enter area length and area width to get instant results.
steps: Paver area (20×20 cm): 0.04 m² per paver
mistakes: Skipping or under-sizing the gravel base — leads to settling and cracking
Not compacting the gravel and sand bedding layers properly
Using paver size in metres instead of centimetres
formula_display: Area = Length × Width; Pavers = ceil(area ÷ (paver_L × paver_W) × pattern_factor); Gravel = area × 0.15 × 1.8
